rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE KONSTIN FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Clarify That The Order After Hearing On J Konstin'S Demurrer Did Not Dismiss Petitioner'S Fraud Claim In Count 2 Based On Respondent J. Konstin'S Handling Of The Mazatlan Proceeds.
rulings.Rulings: The Motion to Clarify is off calendar. Because the order addressed by this motion is the same order that is the subject of the pending appeal, the Court has no power to entertain this motion. Any party wishing to appear to contest this tentative ruling must so advise the Court (415-551-3772) and opposing parties by 4:30 Thursday afternoon, May 9, 2013.
